caption: In a formal meeting room, a presentation is being given. A large screen displays a "Memorandum" with a logo and text. Several people are seated at a long table, viewed from behind or the side; they are wearing dark suits and professional attire. On the left, a man with glasses is visible in profile. To the right, another individual is partially seen. A white binder and other documents sit on the table near a computer monitor. Across the bottom of the screen, a consistent graphic overlay features the "ORCA" logo on the left and the text "April 12, 2019 House Committee on General, Housing, and Military Affairs S.23 Increasing the Minimum Wage" on a white and green background. As the sequence progresses, the camera angle shifts slightly, moving from a wider view of the screen to a closer perspective of the people and the presentation.
